body:
Omar, thanks for the note — really helpful context on the [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital) pipeline as we head into Q1. I've been thinking more about what you flagged regarding the carbon capture cohort, and I agree that the valuation anchoring from last year's deals is creating some friction with founders who have more realistic expectations now. My instinct is that we lean into the Series-A gap rather than compete on seed where things are still frothy. Would love to get 30 minutes on the calendar before the holidays to pressure-test that thesis with you — your read on the infrastructure side has been spot-on so far this cycle. Let me know what works.

Amara
